name: Harvest Round Bread (Breadmaker)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat your breadmaker to the desired settings.
2. In a large bowl, combine whole wheat flour and yeast with water until smooth.
3. Add honey, oatmeal, molasses, salt, white flour, carrots, milk, raisins, nuts, and margarine to the wet ingredients.
4. Mix all ingredients together in the breadmaker's mixing bowl.
5. Shape the dough into a round loaf by dividing it into three parts and making ropes.
6. Braid the ropes and form them into a circle.
7. Attach the ends of the braided rope securely.
8. Repeat with the remaining dough half.
9. Follow your breadmaker's instructions for completing the baking process.
This recipe is designed to be made in a breadmaker, ensuring consistent results without any aggressive cooking methods.
